title: Malfu Combat Animation
description: New Animation For Default Better Combat
body:
![Malfu Combat Animation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eefdff0527819507976398e52a603660425e1348.png)

**Hello there everyone!**

I modify default Better Combat weapon_attributes, and add some of my custom animation!
so far i've changed weapon_attributes and added animation for Axe, BattleStaff, Claymore, Claw Cutlass, Dagger, Doubleaxe, Fist, Halberd, Hammer, Mace, Rapier, and Sword.

**DATAPACK AND RESOURCEPACK REQUIRED**. Use Paxi or OpenLoader to load both DP and RP.
Mods is made from a package feature from modrinth. Sometimes the load order is wrong, causing the animation to not play properly. Paxi or Openloader work most of the time.

**Player Invalid? use Packet Fixer mod**

Turn out, modrinth has a generator to make datapack to whatever loader i want. Cool!

**The Animation Video**

The demo for all animation is down here, but are you sure not going to try it yourself?
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
Well, Here you go!
  
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/DQnLQAKnU9M" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

</details>

Just in case:

- You can use this datapack and resourcepack for your personal use or for a modpack.
- You can make your own new datapack to use my animation resourcepack.
